ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the module belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the module construction starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the module construction ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the module (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the material belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the material belongs to */,
  "product" TEXT /* Name of the material product */,
  "lci_activity" TEXT /* LCI activity description */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the material */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the material */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Manufacturing facility, Market) */,
  "source_region" TEXT /* Region where the material is sourced */,
  "modal_combo" TEXT /* Modal combination (e.g., truck only, not applicable) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from source to construction site */,
  "geo_rep" TEXT /* Geographical representation (e.g., Fair, Good) */,
  "tech_rep" TEXT /* Technical representation (e.g., Fair, Good) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was manufactured */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the material expires */,
  "environmental_impact_score" REAL /* A score indicating the environmental impact of the material */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the material's datasheet */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* The carbon footprint of the material */,
  "recyclable" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the material is recyclable */,
  "recycling_method" TEXT /* The method of recycling if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier based on quality, delivery, and environmental practices */,
  "environmental_certificate" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the supplier has environmental certifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "environmental_impact_factor" REAL /* A factor indicating the typical environmental impact of materials in this category */,
  "sustainability_guidelines" TEXT /* Sustainability guidelines specific to this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, architect, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
